items.shortDescription: End-to-end property dashboard managing tenant billing, automated invoice distribution, and maintenance requests.
items.title: Property Management System (PMS)
items.description: A comprehensive SaaS platform designed for property managers to handle leases, track occupancy rates, and automate financial reports. Features include automated PDF invoice generation, integration with local payment systems, and tenant complaint ticketing pipelines.
items.result: 120+ units managed, rent collection efficiency increased by 40%

items.shortDescription: Point-Of-Sale retail system synced with automated multi-channel CRM pipelines and inventory notifications.
items.title: TokoWaku POS & Automation Integration
items.description: TokoWaku bridges physical store operations with cloud database records. It automatically monitors inventory levels, generates low-stock alerts, and dispatches automated WhatsApp updates to suppliers. Integrated with Google Sheets and Discord hooks for real-time reporting.
items.result: 3 active stores integrated, stockout events reduced to zero

items.shortDescription: Low-latency browser tool automating lead capture and contact extraction from active tabs.
items.title: Premium Productivity Chrome Extension
items.description: A custom lightweight Google Chrome extension designed for sales teams. Scrapes contact details from current active tabs dynamically, filters profiles using custom criteria, and posts qualified leads directly to a centralized CRM server via webhook integration.

items.shortDescription: Indonesia's #1 bird song training and competition discovery platform, featuring advanced audio management, geo-location event tracking, and seamless hybrid monetization.
items.title: Raja Gacor: No. 1 Bird Song Training & Competition App
items.description:
A highly-optimized native Android application built with Flutter, tailored for the vibrant bird-hobbyist community in Indonesia. The app delivers high-fidelity audio training (masteran) leveraging a custom implementation of just_audio and audio_service for uninterrupted background playback. 

It features live bird competition discovery integrated with real-time Firestore synchronization, device geolocating for local event tracking, and deep-linking capabilities via app_links to drive viral user acquisition. Engineered with robust offline state management using SharedPreferences, secure OAuth2 authentications, and optimized data models to ensure seamless operation under weak cellular connectivity.
items.result: Successfully published on Google Play Store with functional hybrid monetization (AdMob + In-App Purchases) and active automated update integration.

items.shortDescription: AI-powered product catalog builder and instant transactional link generator for micro-merchants.
items.title: StoreLink / UMKM-AI Platform
items.description: StoreLink helps small-scale merchants structure their catalogs. Merchants enter text or upload product images, and the built-in AI assistant automatically generates descriptions, categorizes items, and builds a mini sales page with direct checkout links.
items.result: Successfully launched MVP for local retail merchants, generating over 1,500 transactional links

items.shortDescription: Premium audio-centric wellness app. Features 4-channel sound mixing, 3D spatial studio, and haptic-guided breathwork for sleep and productivity.
items.title: ZenBird: Premium Nature Sounds & Wellness
items.description: A sophisticated Flutter-based wellness application engineered for immersive audio experiences. Built with just_audio and custom audio_service implementations to support high-fidelity multi-channel mixing, allowing users to layer ambient soundscapes with granular volume control. Features a 3D Spatial Studio for psychoacoustic sound positioning, synchronized haptic-visual breathwork, and Pomodoro-based Deep Focus timers. Optimized with advanced caching mechanisms for seamless content delivery and a clean, subscription-free "lifetime" monetization model via Google Play Billing
items.result: Successfully launched with lifetime-access value proposition, resulting in high organic user retention and 5-star feedback on spatial audio quality.
